data.title: USPS to add temporary 8% package-shipping surcharge
data.description: The surcharge is expected to have the greatest impact on small and mid-sized ecommerce sellers and distributors that depend on USPS for cost-effective ground shipping.

data.title: ReFiBuy debuts platform to optimize catalog data for agentic commerce
data.description: A new engine for developers will use ReFiBuy's Commerce Intelligence Engine to help merchants optimize product data for AI-enabled discovery.

data.title: FedEx to offer two-hour delivery through SameDay Local initiative
data.description: The carrier said its new FedEx SameDay Local service will connect its customers to a national network of more than 1,000 delivery providers using AI-powered "intelligent orchestration."

data.title: Shopify brands now shoppable inside ChatGPT
data.description: Harley Finkelstein, Shopify's president, has posted a video to LinkedIn showing how the ChatGPT integration will work. And as of March 24 — when he posted to LinkedIn — the Shopify-ChatGPT integration is live, according to his written post accompanying the video.

data.title: Home Depot expands Pro platform with AI and project management features
data.description: The home improvement retailer said its expansion is part of a broader effort to build an integrated ecosystem of tools and services for professional customers.
